mapper.sql: id, name, code, description, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, code FROM sys_role WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role (name, code, description, sort, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{description}, #{sort}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_role SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_role SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
